name: spectrum-text
title: Spectrum Text
description: Inline text with a shifting multi stop gradient fill.

api.description: Inline text with a shifting multi-stop gradient fill built from SVG gradient code (data URI, not an external file). Glyphs stay still; only the clipped background moves. Screen readers get a plain copy; the animated layer is hidden from assistive tech.

props.name: children
props.description: Text or inline content to paint with the gradient fill.

props.name: colors
props.description: Gradient stops for the fill. Rendered as inline SVG linearGradient markup when colors are hex or rgb. CSS variables fall back to a CSS gradient. The first color is appended again so the loop stays seamless.

props.name: speed
props.description: Animation speed multiplier. 1 is the base loop (10s). 2 runs twice as fast (5s).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the host span.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --spectrum-text-color-1
props.description: First stop. Closest kit match to magenta: rose-470.

props.name: --spectrum-text-color-2
props.description: Second stop. Closest kit match to violet: violet-670.

props.name: --spectrum-text-color-3
props.description: Third stop. Closest kit match to blue: blue-530.

props.name: --spectrum-text-color-4
props.description: Fourth stop. Closest kit match to sky: azure-330.

props.name: --spectrum-text-duration
props.description: Base loop duration at speed 1. The component overrides this from the speed prop.

props.name: --spectrum-text-ease
props.description: Timing function for the spectrum loop.

props.name: --spectrum-text-background-size
props.description: Gradient size so position shifts read clearly.
